---
name: review-project
description: Review the current project and suggest improvements plus new data connections.
agent: Project Reviewer & Data Scout
---

Review this repository as a full project.

Focus on:
- code quality
- project structure
- simulation logic
- data loading
- FastF1 usage
- OpenF1 usage
- FIA document integration
- weather modelling
- fantasy scoring
- visual/report generation
- README accuracy
- useful new data connections

Do not edit files.

Inspect the relevant files before answering, especially:
- README.md
- requirements.txt
- pyproject.toml
- package.json
- src/**/*.py
- src/**/*.ts
- scripts/**/*.py
- outputs/**/*.json
- outputs/**/*.csv
- config files
- any existing data-source modules

Return the review using the Project Reviewer & Data Scout output format.
